overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit metropolis. The player traverses an elevated pedestrian walkway surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, transitioning from an open-air section to a covered walkway with views of street traffic below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge with neon city views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated pedestrian bridge surrounded by towering neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the pathway

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building wrapped with multiple rotating holographic advertisements and neon signage
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings covered in bright neon lights and digital billboards
concrete pedestrian walkway with glowing orange edge lighting strips
safety railings with integrated orange neon light strips running along the walkway edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an exposed elevated pedestrian walkway at night, surrounded by a cyberpunk cityscape of towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The cylindrical ad tower dominates the left side while the walkway stretches forward toward a dense cluster of neon-lit buildings. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with overhead transit structure

events.description: walks under an overhead covered structure, transitioning from open sky to sheltered walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered walkway section with neon-lit shopfronts visible to the right side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and dark pants walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: concrete and metal overhead walkway roof with integrated cyan neon tube lighting
row of commercial storefronts with bright neon signage and illuminated displays under the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered section of the elevated walkway, with an overhead concrete structure featuring cyan neon lighting. The cylindrical ad tower passes out of view behind while neon-lit shopfronts line the right side. The crowd density increases slightly with pedestrians walking in various directions under the shelter.

events.description: camera turns left to reveal the multi-lane street with moving traffic running parallel to the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered walkway while turning to observe the traffic on the street below to the left

notable_agents.action: dark-colored car driving along the multi-lane street parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: elevated multi-lane road with asphalt surface running parallel to the pedestrian walkway
cars and trucks driving along the street with headlights visible in the night
metal safety barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the drop to the street below

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the covered walkway as the camera turns left to reveal a multi-lane street with moving traffic running parallel below. The neon shopfronts pass behind while vehicles drive along the road visible beyond the safety railing. The overhead structure shifts to the right side as the walkway opens up toward a wider urban intersection ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along an elevated pedestrian walkway that transitions from an open-air cityscape into a sheltered urban corridor. It begins on an exposed path surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, with a massive cylindrical ad tower dominating the left side as sparse pedestrians pass by. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into a covered section where a concrete overhead structure with cyan neon lighting replaces the open sky and the ad tower fades from view. The perspective then turns left to reveal a multi-lane street with flowing traffic running parallel below the safety railing, while neon-lit shopfronts recede into the background. Finally, the overhead shelter shifts to the right as the walkway opens up toward a wide, glowing urban intersection ahead.
